code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn skip_ws(_ line: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = start
  mut cont = true
  while cont
    if i >= n
      cont = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          cont = false
        end
      when None
        cont = false
      end
    end
  end
  i
end

fn skip_token(_ line: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = start
  mut cont = true
  while cont
    if i >= n
      cont = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          cont = false
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        cont = false
      end
    end
  end
  i
end

mut total = 0
mut reading = true
while reading
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let a = skip_ws(line, 0)
    let b = skip_token(line, a)
    let c = skip_ws(line, b)
    let d = skip_token(line, c)
    if c < d
      let tok = string.substring(line, c, d)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        total = total + v
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  when None
    reading = false
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
